item.title: 你的人工智能代理不知道它的记忆何时消失
item.summary: arXiv:2607.10582v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents accumulate heterogeneous context, including system instructions, plans, user turns, retrieved documents, tool outputs, and intermediate reasoning, whose key-value (KV) cache can become a major memory bottleneck.
